title: Henderson Vo
text:
Welcome!
My name is Henderson and I’m happy you’re here! This website is meant to act like a personal portfolio. Feel free to browse and learn more about my work.

I am currently studying at UC Santa Barbara to earn my bachelor’s in Environmental Studies and Statistics & Data Science. In September 2025, I joined the Bren-Environmental Studies Fellows program.
My work revolves around quantitative ecology and climate resilience. Please reach out through email if you would like to chat.
